00027 #ifndef JELATINE_LOADER_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_LOADER_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "array.h"
00033 #include "class.h"
00034 #include "opcodes.h"
00035 #include "util.h"
00036 
00037 /******************************************************************************
00038  * Globals                                                                    *
00039  ******************************************************************************/
00040 
00041 extern class_t *array_classes[];
00042 
00043 /******************************************************************************
00044  * Loader interface                                                           *
00045  ******************************************************************************/
00046 
00047 extern void bcl_init( void );
00048 extern class_t *bcl_get_class_by_id(uint32_t);
00049 extern void bcl_mark( void );
00050 extern bool bcl_is_assignable(class_t *, class_t *);
00051 extern void bcl_preload_bootstrap_classes( void );
00052 extern class_t *bcl_resolve_class(class_t *, const char *);
00053 extern class_t *bcl_find_class(const char *);
00054 extern void bcl_link_method(class_t *, method_t *);
00055 extern const uint8_t *bcl_link_opcode(const method_t *, const uint8_t *,
00056                                       internal_opcode_t);
00057 
00058 /******************************************************************************
00059  * Inlined loader functions                                                   *
00060  ******************************************************************************/
00061 
00068 static inline class_t *bcl_array_class(array_type_t type)
00069 {
00070     assert((type >= T_BOOLEAN) && (type <= T_LONG)
00071            && array_classes[type - T_BOOLEAN]);
00072 
00073     return array_classes[type - T_BOOLEAN];
00074 } // bcl_array_class()
00075 
00080 static inline void bcl_set_array_class(array_type_t type, class_t *cl)
00081 {
00082     assert((type >= T_BOOLEAN) && (type <= T_LONG));
00083 
00084     array_classes[type - T_BOOLEAN] = cl;
00085 } // bcl_set_array_class()
00086 
00087 #endif // !JELATINE_LOADER_H
